name: runway
description: Runway — generate AI video, images, and audio (Gen-4.5, up to 4K) via the official Runway MCP, with Runway's official skills.

interface.shortDescription: AI video/image/audio generation, with official skills
interface.longDescription: Connect the official Runway MCP to generate AI video, images, and audio (Gen-4.5, up to 4K) from UniAI. Authenticate with a Runway API key. Bundled with Runway's official skills for generation and integration.
